desc.zh: 镇江轨道交通运营线路图于2025年绘制，此线路图为虚拟线路图，2026年春夏之交进行大范围修改，现更改为”南京地铁宁镇段“。以江苏省镇江市为基础，设计城市轨道交通，共设有轨道交通七条线，有轨电车四条线，分别为1号线（下蜀～丹徒火车站）、2号线（京江路～新坝）、3号线（江海之门～茅山风景区）、4号线（焦山公园～句容）、5号（北固山南～马相伯路）、S1号线（丹徒火车站～常州奔牛国际机场）、S2号线（茅山风景区～溧水）、有轨电车T1（江滨路～杨帆路）、有轨电车T2（梦溪路～高新区）、有轨电车T3跃然广场～韦岗）、江心有轨电车（越河街～江心洲汽渡）。
desc.en:
The Zhenjiang Rail Transit System map was originally drawn in 2025 as a conceptual design. It underwent extensive revisions during the spring-summer transition of 2026 and has since been rebranded as the "Nanjing Metro Ningzhen Section." Based on Zhenjiang City, Jiangsu Province, this urban rail transit system comprises seven metro lines and four tram lines:
-Line 1 (Xiashu to Dantu Railway Station), 
-Line 2 (Jingjianglu to Xinba), 
-Line 3 (Jianghaizhimen to Maoshan Scenic Area), 
-Line 4 (Jiaoshan Park to Jurong), 
-Line 5 (Beigushannan to Maxiangbolu),
-S1 Line (Dantu Railway Station to Changzhou Benniu International Airport),
-S2 Line (Maoshan Scenic to Lishui),
-Tram T1 (Jiangbinlu to Yangfanlu),
-Tram T2 (Mengxilu to Gaoxinqu),
-Tram T3 (Yueran Square to Weigang),
- Jiangxin Tram (Yuehejie to Jiangxinzhou Ferry).

reference: 爱发电,Sun Aug 24 2025 08:00:00 GMT+0800 (中国标准时间)

updateHistory.reason: 根据实际情况对运营图进行更加可行性的大范围修改。
